windows.label: main
windows.title: Ban Basic Island — MTG Arena Companion

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.scryfall.com https://*.scryfall.io https://cards.scryfall.io https://*.netlify.app https://banbasicisland.netlify.app; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost https://*.scryfall.io https://cards.scryfall.io https://*.netlify.app; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Daily MTG Arena meta decks and tournament intel
bundle.longDescription: Ban Basic Island is a desktop companion for Magic: The Gathering Arena. Get eight curated decks every day — one per constructed format — with Bo1/Bo3 options, tier lists, matchups, sideboard guides, and meta tournament pulse.
